error_signature: pagination shows fewer records than expected
title: Pagination not displaying all records in Supabase
symptom: When navigating through pagination, fewer records are displayed than expected, and sometimes no records appear. The paginator shows a full table when going back.
applies_when: Pagination is set up for a bound table collection
not_this_if: No filters are applied to the bound table collection
root_cause: The filter applied to the bound table collection was incorrectly configured, limiting the number of records fetched and displayed. Removing the filter allowed the pagination to function correctly.
fix_steps: Remove the filter from the bound table collection
Add the filter as a front-end filter instead
Test the pagination to ensure it displays all records
agent_instruction: Adjust the filter settings on the bound table collection to resolve pagination issues.
